---
title: "test_think.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\test_think.py"
loc: 16
complexity: 3
logic_score: 6.60
style_score: 3.88
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.79
---

## Intent
The `test_think.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_think. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_think. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [src.core.mimir_client](file://src.core.mimir_client)

### Exports
- `test_think`
